summary: 7+ years in supply chain at Tetra Pak, from thesis student to replenishment manager. Every role taught me something different about how operations actually work, and where they break.

roles.title: Replenishment Manager
roles.lesson: Owning the end-to-end. Right product, right place, right time.

roles.title: Team Coordinator, Supply Planning
roles.lesson: People leadership. Coordinating a team is its own supply chain.

roles.title: Master Scheduler
roles.lesson: 180M+ euros COGS, 12+ suppliers across 6 countries. Global complexity.

roles.title: Supply Chain Analyst
roles.lesson: S&OP standardization. Making the plan actually match reality.

roles.title: Junior Supply Chain Specialist
roles.lesson: Where I first saw the gap between what the data says and what the room decides.

roles.title: Master Thesis Student
roles.lesson: S&OP in engineer-to-order environments. Where Tetra Pak started for me.

education.institution: R. V. College of Engineering, Bangalore
